cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking which month is usually not when people go rafting in the Grand Canyon, based on the provided information. First, I need to look at the text given. The part about the timing of the trips says: "Most trips occur between April and October." So that means the usual rafting season is from April through October. The options given are June (A), February (B), October (C), and September (D). The question is asking for the month that's an exception, meaning not in that range. The options are B (February) and the others are within April-October. The text also mentions that for those vacationing off-season, there are alternatives like the Native American Red River rafting which is available year-round or a one-day trip on the Colorado River. So off-season would be outside April to October. So February is outside that range. October is included in the usual season,
